questions.question: 1 (a) The electronic structures of five atoms, A, B, C, D and E, are shown. ABCDE Answer the following questions about these electronic structures. Each electronic structure may be used once, more than once or not at all. State which electronic structure, A, B, C, D or E, represents: (i) an atom of an element in Group VI of the Periodic Table .....................................

questions.question: 5 (a) Cement is made by heating a mixture of calcium carbonate and powdered clay. (i) Choose from the list the name of the substance which contains calcium carbonate. Draw a circle around the correct answer. bauxite hematite limestone slaked lime [1] (ii) The heat for this process is provided by burning natural gas. Name t

copper < nickel < iron < lithium (2) if 2 marks not scored 1 mark for 1 consecutive pair reversed / lithium < iron < nickel < copper
